ήΑΝ INITIAL MESSAGE (SNIPPET) ήΑΞ

Shadow the Hedgehog was dead.

Memories turned to stories of the hero who saved the world. Like a legend told to younger Mobian's of the hedgehog who gave them a chance at life, a chance for happiness. The ARK was abandoned to drift amongst the stars with the evidence of this mercy in the form of a fractured moon. Sonic and his friends mourned the loss, but kept his actions remembered.

It was like he never existed. What little the hero owned disappeared with the only item left being in Rouge's possession as his inhibitor ring, the destruction from preconceived anger was rebuilt and the world moved on. The only knowledge of the hedgehogs existence was through word of mouth and the moon that glowed in two spilt pieces in the night sky.

Soon his memory would fade and be re-told, like the new testament and its interpreted scripture passed down and re-written through time until no one knew of its original truth. Sonic was still alive to tell the true story, but he was only one person in an ocean of whispering people who would rather believe each others false telling's than the true witness.

Maybe if he returned, like the savour who rose from death to give one final blessing, the story would change. But like all honourable legends, they faded with time until eventually they were forgotten.

That's why he hid himself.

...
